TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: New Zealand, u kamu nu Sakizaya: Niw-Si-Lan u New zealand sa i labu nu usingyu , itiza i 41 00 S, 174 00 E. New Zealand i waliyu nu timulan nu subal a kanatal, tapang tusu u Uy-Lin-Dun , satabakiya a tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) a tukay. New Zealand tusa ku angangan nu subal, timulan atu amisan a subal, inatusaay a subal u Ku-Ke' a bayu ku laad, tapang tusu Uy-Lin-Dun i amis nu sadikuday a subal, mahini yadah hen ku adidi'ay nu subal. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 268,838 km2. ku ahebal nu lala' sa izaw ku 264,537 km2, u ahebal nu nanum sa izaw ku 4,301 km2. kakalukan a umah sa 43.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 31.40%, zuma henay a umah sa 25.40%. tabaki ku lala' nu New Zealand u pituay nu Taywan a kitidaan nu lala nuheni, pulung han sa tusa a bataan idaw ku 8 km2, nika celcel nu tademaw han hatida u Taywan nu 1/7. hamin nu tademaw sa 4,474,549. demiad kapah ku demiad nu New Zealand , tamelac ku liklik, bangcal ku hekal, yadah ku tataydaan midang, lalud caay kaw caledesay ku demiad caay kahida u Taywan 36 tu halemheman ku caledes, kasienawan caay tu kahida u Taywan tu kalasengesengtan ku sienaw. . lala' itida i New Zealand taneng misalihalihalay atu misasingsing ku nikaudipan, taneng mikilm tu sakacaay kalecad nu nipitahawan tu kawawan, ya Niw-si-lan u hekal mahida u nipikulitan, idaw ku silamalay nu buyu'an, maupuay nu suleda i buyu', tabakiay nu banawbanawan atu bangcalay nu likenlikenan. u kapah nu hekal nu Niw-si-lan tu sakacaay kalecad nu tataydaan midang, u mitahaway nu tademaw taneng atu kasinganganan nu Niw-si-lan a tademaw ci Ay-de-mung. Si-la-lei malecad mikayakay tu buyu', hakiya atu u pabay misalukiyaw, migalasang atu talakaway nu hahalebutan nu kawawan, ina Niw-si-lan u tada kapahay nu sakayhekalan nu tataydaan midang. . tu sep cay sip mihcaan Lein-he-kuo kay-fa-ci-ha-su mihapu tu tademaw anikalahatan, sakapitu nu nikasinganganan kina Niw-si-lan. Śú®2014 7 šĹć. tapang tusu nu kanatal amisan nu Niw-si-lan subalan u Wi-lin-tun "Wellington" u suotu nu Niw-si-lan, itida i amisan subal sakatimul nu Niw-si-lan. . u sakatusa nu New Zealand tabakiay a tukayan, Sie-Li (ťõ™śĘ®, Sydney) atu Mue-E-Pen (ŚĘ®Áąĺśú¨, Melbourne) mala u Da-Yang-Cuo teban nu lalangawan. katuud ku matinengay tu nalimaan a tademaw itini mueneng atu misakakawaw, idaw henay ku nalimaan a kafa atu atu salabi sananay nu misalamaay nu tademaw. . kakiningan nu kanatal a demiad kakiningan nu kanatal a demiad i enem a bulad tusa a demiad. satabakiay nu kanatal a tapang sakakaay nu tapang (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Elizabeth II, mikayad tu demiad sa i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihca tusa a bulad enem a demiad. cunli u cunli nu New Zealand ayza ci Jacinda Ardern , mikayatay nu demiad i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan cacay a bataan a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku enem a demiad. ÁīźŤ•ŅŤė≠ÁöĄÁłĹÁźÜśėĮJacinda Ardern , ÁôĽŚüļśó•śúüśėĮ2017ŚĻī10śúą26śó• satabakiyay a tusu satabakiyay nu tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) itida i nutimulan a nan- tay-pin-yeng 37 tu' (37 00 S, (Auckland) šĹćśĖľŚćóŚ§™ŚĻ≥śīčŚćóÁ∑Į37Śļ¶. u New Zealand itini i amisan u satabakiay nu tukayan, sapanganganan han "sipayapaya nu balunga a tukay" , tayaw u New Zealand nu kung-ye atu tatelungan nu patiyamay. . sayaway nu nipatideng tu suotu i New Zealand u Au-Ke-Lan , nika i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1865) a mihecaan malimad taydan i amisan nu subal sakatimul nu Uy-Lin-Dun . . aydaay a Aw-ke-lan itida tu i New Zealand saka limulakan a kakitidaan, u Nan-tay-pin-yEng a anganganan, u cacumudan nu tataydaan nu midangay a tademaw, itida i tu sep sep nem mihcaan nu kitakidan u sakapahay a tukay nu mapiliay, Aw-ke-lan itini i kitakid u sakalalima tu ku nikasinganganan. . .
S.PHON: n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand, u kamu nu sakizaja: niw-si-r~…ĺan u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand sa i r~…ĺabu nu usiŇčju , itiza i ** ** s, *** ** …ô. n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand i war~…ĺiju nu timur~…ĺan nu subar~…ĺ a kanatar~…ĺ, tapaŇč tusu u uj-r~…ĺin-dun , satabakija a tukaj u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan (***, au ¶kr~…ĺand) a tukaj. n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand tusa ku aŇčaŇčan nu subar~…ĺ, timur~…ĺan atu amisan a subar~…ĺ, inatusaaj a subar~…ĺ u ku-k…ô Ē~ ° a baju ku r~…ĺaad, tapaŇč tusu uj-r~…ĺin-dun i amis nu sadikudaj a subar~…ĺ, mańßini jadańß ńß…ôn ku adidi Ē~ °aj nu subar~…ĺ. u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° mapur~…ĺuŇč sa izaw ku ***,*** km*. ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° sa izaw ku ***,*** km*, u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanum sa izaw ku *,*** km*. kakar~…ĺukan a umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zuma ńß…ônaj a umańß sa **.**%. tabaki ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u pituaj nu tajwan a kitidaan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa nuńß…ôni, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan sa tusa a bataan idaw ku * km*, nika ¶…ôr~…ĺ ¶…ôr~…ĺ nu tad…ômaw ńßan ńßatida u tajwan nu */*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa *,***,***. d…ômiad kapańß ku d…ômiad nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand , tam…ôr~…ĺa ¶ ku r~…ĺikr~…ĺik, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, jadańß ku tatajdaan midaŇč, r~…ĺar~…ĺud ¶aaj kaw ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsaj ku d…ômiad ¶aaj kańßida u tajwan ** tu ńßar~…ĺ…ômńß…ôman ku ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs, kasi…ônawan ¶aaj tu kańßida u tajwan tu kar~…ĺas…ôŇč…ôs…ôŇčtan ku si…ônaw. . r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° itida i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand tan…ôŇč misar~…ĺińßar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj atu misasiŇčsiŇč ku nikaudipan, tan…ôŇč mikir~…ĺm tu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu nipitańßawan tu kawawan, ja niw-si-r~…ĺan u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ mańßida u nipikur~…ĺitan, idaw ku sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj nu buju Ē~ °an, maupuaj nu sur~…ĺ…ôda i buju Ē~ °, tabakiaj nu banawbanawan atu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺik…ônr~…ĺik…ônan. u kapańß nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu niw-si-r~…ĺan tu saka ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu tatajdaan midaŇč, u mitańßawaj nu tad…ômaw tan…ôŇč atu kasiŇčaŇčanan nu niw-si-r~…ĺan a tad…ômaw ¶i aj-d…ô-muŇč. si-r~…ĺa-r~…ĺ…ôi mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad mikajakaj tu buju Ē~ °, ńßakija atu u pabaj misar~…ĺukijaw, migar~…ĺasaŇč atu tar~…ĺakawaj nu ńßańßar~…ĺ…ôbutan nu kawawan, ina niw-si-r~…ĺan u tada kapańßaj nu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan nu tatajdaan midaŇč. . tu s…ôp ¶aj sip mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo kaj-fa- ¶i-ńßa-su mińßapu tu tad…ômaw anikar~…ĺańßatan, sakapitu nu nikasiŇčaŇčanan kina niw-si-r~…ĺan. ***** * *. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ amisan nu niw-si-r~…ĺan subar~…ĺan u wi-r~…ĺin-tun "w…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺiŇčton" u suotu nu niw-si-r~…ĺan, itida i amisan subar~…ĺ sakatimur~…ĺ nu niw-si-r~…ĺan. . u sakatusa nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand tabakiaj a tukajan, si…ô-r~…ĺi (**, sjdn…ô) atu mu…ô-…ô-p…ôn (***, m…ôr~…ĺbourn…ô) mar~…ĺa u da-jaŇč- ¶uo t…ôban nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. katuud ku matin…ôŇčaj tu nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč atu misakakawaw, idaw ńß…ônaj ku nar~…ĺimaan a kafa atu atu sar~…ĺabi sananaj nu misar~…ĺamaaj nu tad…ômaw. . kakiniŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ a d…ômiad kakiniŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ a d…ômiad i …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiad. satabakiaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a tapaŇč sakakaaj nu tapaŇč ( ¶oŇč-tuŇč, **) ajza sa ¶i …ôr~…ĺizab…ôtńß ii, mikajad tu d…ômiad sa i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶a tusa a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad. ¶unr~…ĺi u ¶unr~…ĺi nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand ajza ¶i *a ¶inda ard…ôrn , mikajataj nu d…ômiad i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad. ********a ¶inda ard…ôrn , **************** satabakijaj a tusu satabakijaj nu tukaj u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan (***, au ¶kr~…ĺand) itida i nutimur~…ĺan a nan- taj-pin-j…ôŇč ** tu Ē~ ° (** ** s, (au ¶kr~…ĺand) ***********. u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand itini i amisan u satabakiaj nu tukajan, sapaŇčaŇčanan ńßan "sipajapaja nu bar~…ĺuŇča a tukaj" , tajaw u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand nu kuŇč-j…ô atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu patijamaj. . sajawaj nu nipatid…ôŇč tu suotu i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan , nika i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß…ô ¶aan mar~…ĺimad tajdan i amisan nu subar~…ĺ sakatimur~…ĺ nu uj-r~…ĺin-dun . . ajdaaj a aw-k…ô-r~…ĺan itida tu i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand saka r~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a kakitidaan, u nan-taj-pin-j…ôŇč a aŇčaŇčanan, u ¶a ¶umudan nu tatajdaan nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw, itida i tu s…ôp s…ôp n…ôm mińß ¶aan nu kitakidan u sakapańßaj a tukaj nu mapir~…ĺiaj, aw-k…ô-r~…ĺan itini i kitakid u sakar~…ĺar~…ĺima tu ku nikasiŇčaŇčanan. . .
S.FORM: New Zealand, u kamu nu Sakizaya: Niw-Si-Lan u New zealand sa i labu nu usingyu , itiza i 41 00 S, 174 00 E. New Zealand i waliyu nu timulan nu subal a kanatal, tapang tusu u Uy-Lin-Dun , satabakiya a tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) a tukay. New Zealand tusa ku angangan nu subal, timulan atu amisan a subal, inatusaay a subal u Ku-Ke' a bayu ku laad, tapang tusu Uy-Lin-Dun i amis nu sadikuday a subal, mahini yadah hen ku adidi'ay nu subal. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 268,838 km2. ku ahebal nu lala' sa izaw ku 264,537 km2, u ahebal nu nanum sa izaw ku 4,301 km2. kakalukan a umah sa 43.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 31.40%, zuma henay a umah sa 25.40%. tabaki ku lala' nu New Zealand u pituay nu Taywan a kitidaan nu lala nuheni, pulung han sa tusa a bataan idaw ku 8 km2, nika celcel nu tademaw han hatida u Taywan nu 1/7. hamin nu tademaw sa 4,474,549. demiad kapah ku demiad nu New Zealand , tamelac ku liklik, bangcal ku hekal, yadah ku tataydaan midang, lalud caay kaw caledesay ku demiad caay kahida u Taywan 36 tu halemheman ku caledes, kasienawan caay tu kahida u Taywan tu kalasengesengtan ku sienaw. . lala' itida i New Zealand taneng misalihalihalay atu misasingsing ku nikaudipan, taneng mikilm tu sakacaay kalecad nu nipitahawan tu kawawan, ya Niw-si-lan u hekal mahida u nipikulitan, idaw ku silamalay nu buyu'an, maupuay nu suleda i buyu', tabakiay nu banawbanawan atu bangcalay nu likenlikenan. u kapah nu hekal nu Niw-si-lan tu sakacaay kalecad nu tataydaan midang, u mitahaway nu tademaw taneng atu kasinganganan nu Niw-si-lan a tademaw ci Ay-de-mung. Si-la-lei malecad mikayakay tu buyu', hakiya atu u pabay misalukiyaw, migalasang atu talakaway nu hahalebutan nu kawawan, ina Niw-si-lan u tada kapahay nu sakayhekalan nu tataydaan midang. . tu sep cay sip mihcaan Lein-he-kuo kay-fa-ci-ha-su mihapu tu tademaw anikalahatan, sakapitu nu nikasinganganan kina Niw-si-lan. Śú®2014 7 šĹć. tapang tusu nu kanatal amisan nu Niw-si-lan subalan u Wi-lin-tun "Wellington" u suotu nu Niw-si-lan, itida i amisan subal sakatimul nu Niw-si-lan. . u sakatusa nu New Zealand tabakiay a tukayan, Sie-Li (ťõ™śĘ®, Sydney) atu Mue-E-Pen (ŚĘ®Áąĺśú¨, Melbourne) mala u Da-Yang-Cuo teban nu lalangawan. katuud ku matinengay tu nalimaan a tademaw itini mueneng atu misakakawaw, idaw henay ku nalimaan a kafa atu atu salabi sananay nu misalamaay nu tademaw. . kakiningan nu kanatal a demiad kakiningan nu kanatal a demiad i enem a bulad tusa a demiad. satabakiay nu kanatal a tapang sakakaay nu tapang (cong-tung, ÁłĹÁĶĪ) ayza sa ci Elizabeth II, mikayad tu demiad sa i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu lima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihca tusa a bulad enem a demiad. cunli u cunli nu New Zealand ayza ci Jacinda Ardern , mikayatay nu demiad i tusa a malebut cacay a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan cacay a bataan a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku enem a demiad. ÁīźŤ•ŅŤė≠ÁöĄÁłĹÁźÜśėĮJacinda Ardern , ÁôĽŚüļśó•śúüśėĮ2017ŚĻī10śúą26śó• satabakiyay a tusu satabakiyay nu tukay u Au-Ke-Lan (Ś•ßŚÖčŤė≠, Auckland) itida i nutimulan a nan- tay-pin-yeng 37 tu' (37 00 S, (Auckland) šĹćśĖľŚćóŚ§™ŚĻ≥śīčŚćóÁ∑Į37Śļ¶. u New Zealand itini i amisan u satabakiay nu tukayan, sapanganganan han "sipayapaya nu balunga a tukay" , tayaw u New Zealand nu kung-ye atu tatelungan nu patiyamay. . sayaway nu nipatideng tu suotu i New Zealand u Au-Ke-Lan , nika i cacay a malebut walu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku lima (1865) a mihecaan malimad taydan i amisan nu subal sakatimul nu Uy-Lin-Dun . . aydaay a Aw-ke-lan itida tu i New Zealand saka limulakan a kakitidaan, u Nan-tay-pin-yEng a anganganan, u cacumudan nu tataydaan nu midangay a tademaw, itida i tu sep sep nem mihcaan nu kitakidan u sakapahay a tukay nu mapiliay, Aw-ke-lan itini i kitakid u sakalalima tu ku nikasinganganan. . .

mikajakaj tu buju Ē~ °, ńßakija atu u pabaj misar~…ĺukijaw, migar~…ĺasaŇč atu tar~…ĺakawaj nu ńßańßar~…ĺ…ôbutan nu kawawan, ina niw-si-r~…ĺan u tada kapańßaj nu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺan nu tatajdaan midaŇč. . tu s…ôp ¶aj sip mińß ¶aan r~…ĺ…ôin-ńß…ô-kuo kaj-fa- ¶i-ńßa-su mińßapu tu tad…ômaw anikar~…ĺańßatan, sakapitu nu nikasiŇčaŇčanan kina niw-si-r~…ĺan. ***** * *. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ amisan nu niw-si-r~…ĺan subar~…ĺan u wi-r~…ĺin-tun "w…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺiŇčton" u suotu nu niw-si-r~…ĺan, itida i amisan subar~…ĺ sakatimur~…ĺ nu niw-si-r~…ĺan. . u sakatusa nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand tabakiaj a tukajan, si…ô-r~…ĺi (**, sjdn…ô) atu mu…ô-…ô-p…ôn (***, m…ôr~…ĺbourn…ô) mar~…ĺa u da-jaŇč- ¶uo t…ôban nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. katuud ku matin…ôŇčaj tu nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw itini mu…ôn…ôŇč atu misakakawaw, idaw ńß…ônaj ku nar~…ĺimaan a kafa atu atu sar~…ĺabi sananaj nu misar~…ĺamaaj nu tad…ômaw. . kakiniŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ a d…ômiad kakiniŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ a d…ômiad i …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺad tusa a d…ômiad. satabakiaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a tapaŇč sakakaaj nu tapaŇč ( ¶oŇč-tuŇč, **) ajza sa ¶i …ôr~…ĺizab…ôtńß ii, mikajad tu d…ômiad sa i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶a tusa a bur~…ĺad …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad. ¶unr~…ĺi u ¶unr~…ĺi nu n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand ajza ¶i *a ¶inda ard…ôrn , mikajataj nu d…ômiad i tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bataan a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm a d…ômiad. ********a ¶inda ard…ôrn , **************** satabakijaj a tusu satabakijaj nu tukaj u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan (***, au ¶kr~…ĺand) itida i nutimur~…ĺan a nan- taj-pin-j…ôŇč ** tu Ē~ ° (** ** s, (au ¶kr~…ĺand) ***********. u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand itini i amisan u satabakiaj nu tukajan, sapaŇčaŇčanan ńßan "sipajapaja nu bar~…ĺuŇča a tukaj" , tajaw u n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand nu kuŇč-j…ô atu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu patijamaj. . sajawaj nu nipatid…ôŇč tu suotu i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand u au-k…ô-r~…ĺan , nika i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku r~…ĺima (****) a mińß…ô ¶aan mar~…ĺimad tajdan i amisan nu subar~…ĺ sakatimur~…ĺ nu uj-r~…ĺin-dun . . ajdaaj a aw-k…ô-r~…ĺan itida tu i n…ôw z…ôar~…ĺand saka r~…ĺimur~…ĺakan a kakitidaan, u nan-taj-pin-j…ôŇč a aŇčaŇčanan, u ¶a ¶umudan nu tatajdaan nu midaŇčaj a tad…ômaw, itida i tu s…ôp s…ôp n…ôm mińß ¶aan nu kitakidan u sakapańßaj a tukaj nu mapir~…ĺiaj, aw-k…ô-r~…ĺan itini i kitakid u sakar~…ĺar~…ĺima tu ku nikasiŇčaŇčanan. . .
